categoryCityContent.description: Check {{count}} current {{categoryPlural}} listings in {{city}} ({{voivodeship}} voivodeship) available for rent or sale. Compare prices, locations and choose the space that fits your needs. You can also browse other categories in {{city}}.
categoryCityContent.descriptionEmpty: There are no {{categoryPlural}} listings in {{city}} ({{voivodeship}} voivodeship) yet. Browse other categories in {{city}} or add your own listing - be the first to reach people looking for {{categoryPlural}} in this area.

q1.answer: Prices of {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}} depend on location, area, standard and rental length. Check {{count}} current listings on MaszBox to compare prices and find the best option. Many listings allow price negotiation directly with the owner.
q1.question: How much does it cost to rent {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}}?

q2.answer: Currently in {{city}} there are {{count}} {{categoryPlural}} listings available - from small to large spaces. Offers cover various districts of {{city}} and surrounding areas. You can filter results by price, area, district and other parameters.
q2.question: How many {{categoryPlural}} listings are available in {{city}}?

q3.answer: Short-term rental ({{categoryPlural}} for days or weeks) is available for selected listings marked as short-term. By default, {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}} are offered for long-term rental (monthly). Check the filters on the listings page.
q3.question: Can I rent {{categoryPlural}} in {{city}} short-term?

q4.answer: Yes. MaszBox is a listings platform where both individuals and companies can add {{categoryPlural}} listings in {{city}} and other cities. Create an account and add a listing - you will reach people actively looking for spaces to rent or buy.
q4.question: Can I add my own {{categoryPlural}} listing in {{city}}?

q5.answer: To contact the owner of a {{categoryPlural}} listing in {{city}}, open the selected listing and click the button revealing the phone number. Contacting owners is free for people searching - no commission or hidden fees.
q5.question: How do I contact the owner of a {{categoryPlural}} listing in {{city}}?

categoryContent.description: Check {{count}} current {{categoryPlural}} listings available across {{cityCount}} cities in Poland. Pick a city to see detailed rent and sale offers.

q1.answer: In {{city}} there are {{count}} current listings for rent and sale of spaces: garages and parking spots, warehouses, units, plots, storage units, basements, containers, attics and rooms. Check all categories and choose the one you are interested in.
q1.question: What spaces can I rent or buy in {{city}}?

q2.answer: Prices in {{city}} ({{voivodeship}} voivodeship) depend on category, area and location. Storage units and basements are usually cheapest, commercial units and warehouses in the center are most expensive. Compare {{count}} current listings on MaszBox.
q2.question: How much does it cost to rent a space in {{city}}?

q3.answer: Yes. MaszBox is a listings platform - you can add your own offer for rent or sale of spaces in {{city}}. Create an account, describe your offer, add photos and publish. Your listing will reach people actively searching for spaces in {{city}}.
q3.question: Can I add my own listing in {{city}}?

q4.answer: Yes. Listings in {{city}} cover all districts and surrounding areas. You can filter results by a specific district or by radius from the center. Choose the option that best fits your needs.
q4.question: Can I filter listings by district of {{city}}?
